articles.author: Passant Rabie
articles.title: Mysterious Metal Spheres Found on Australian Beach May Have Come From Space - Gizmodo
articles.description: The space balls could have been part of a rocket that recently reentered through the atmosphere.
articles.content:
Several metallic objects washed up on a beach in Australia after possibly falling from the skies. But don’t worry, we’re pretty sure it’s not aliens.
